problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by blocking at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
